goal: Systematically replace all legacy emoji-based UI elements with custom, independently drawn SVG assets that strictly adhere to the V9 mineral aesthetic standards.
constraints: Strictly adhere to V9 Mineral Palette (Ivory, Ancient Gold, Cinnabar, Malachite, Ink Black).
Avoid all generic emojis and standard icons.
deliverables: Centralized JixiaIcons library with thematic SVG components.
No legacy emojis in MainMenu and Community modules.
